mapper.sql:
1 = 1
and oi.pay_status =
0 1 2 3 -1
and ( oi.order_no like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or su.real_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or p.name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or su.phone like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or ifnull(oi.pay_method, '') like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
mapper.select: select oi.id as id, oi.order_no as orderNo, rr.register_no as registerNo, su.real_name as customerName, su.phone as phone, p.name as petName, p.species as petSpecies, dp.name as doctorName, oi.pay_method as payMethod, oi.pay_time as paidAt, oi.payable_amount as total, oi.discount_amount as discount, case oi.pay_status when 0 then 'PENDING' when 1 then 'PAID' when 2 then 'REFUNDING' when 3 then 'REFUNDED' else 'PENDING' end as status from order_info oi left join register_record rr on rr.id = oi.register_id left join sys_user su on su.id = oi.owner_user_id left join pet p on p.id = oi.pet_id left join doctor_profile dp on dp.id = rr.doctor_id where order by oi.id desc limit #{offset}, #{limit}
select count(1) from order_info oi left join register_record rr on rr.id = oi.register_id left join sys_user su on su.id = oi.owner_user_id left join pet p on p.id = oi.pet_id where
mapper.update: update order_info set pay_status = 1, pay_method = #{payMethod}, pay_time = now(), paid_amount = payable_amount, update_time = now(), updated_time = now() where id = #{id} and pay_status = 0
